description: This knit scarf made of 100% cotton comes in a grey colour with black stripes on one side and jet black with grey branding on the other. The cotton offers exemplary warmth, making it a perfect addition to your winter wardrobe. Team it with a formal jacket or to smarten up a casual coat. Length: 160 cm Width: 14 cm Washcare Hand wash with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Warm iron
